name: component-structure
question: What UI components are needed?
decision: Create: (1) FeatureControlPlanePage - main page, (2) SkillCycleStepper - horizontal stepper for phases, (3) FeatureSessionSelector - sidebar list, (4) FeatureChatPanel - chat interface with tool call display, (5) EntityDataPanel - tabbed entity viewer.
rationale: Modular component structure allows reuse and testing. Each component has single responsibility. Compose on main page.
